project.name: UNDRGRND Movement
project.tagline: Foundational movement for body and mind

dance.name: Afro Groove - Foundations
dance.short_description: Beginner-friendly dance fitness inspired by Afrobeat and groove-based styles
dance.full_description: Afro Groove – Foundations is a beginner-friendly dance fitness class designed to improve rhythm, coordination, and full-body movement in a structured and supportive environment. Inspired by Afrobeat and groove-based styles, this class focuses on simple, repeatable movement patterns that build lower body strength, core stability, and overall mobility. Through each curated, smooth, and authentic movement, you'll develop confidence, body awareness, and a deeper connection to rhythm and music. Suitable for adults with no prior dance experience, sessions include guided warm-ups, easy-to-follow sequences, and controlled movement training.
core_focus: Lower body strength and core stability
who_its_for: Adults with no prior dance experience
Anyone looking to start dance fitness
what_to_expect: Guided warm-ups to prepare your body
Full-body workout with emphasis on lower body

dance.name: Booty Burn - Foundations
dance.short_description: High-energy lower body and glute-focused dance fitness class
dance.full_description: Booty Burn – Foundations is a high-energy, beginner-friendly dance fitness class focused on lower body strength, glute activation, and full-body conditioning through fun and engaging movement. Combining dance-inspired sequences with targeted lower body exercises, this class is designed to build strength, improve coordination, and get your heart rate up in a supportive and motivating environment. Through each curated, smooth, and authentic movement, you'll work your glutes, legs, and core while developing rhythm, confidence, and body awareness. No prior dance experience is required — just come ready to move and have fun.
core_focus: Glute activation and lower body strength

dance.name: Movement Flow - Foundations
dance.short_description: Build body flow and confidence through expressive movement
dance.full_description: Movement Flow – Foundations is a beginner-friendly class designed to help you reconnect with your body through fluid, natural movement in a calm and supportive environment. The focus is on developing body awareness, improving mobility, and building confidence through simple, guided movement sequences that feel natural and accessible. Each session introduces easy-to-follow patterns that encourage smooth transitions, gentle strength work, and a greater sense of ease in how you move. Through each curated, smooth, and authentic movement, you'll develop coordination, flexibility, and a deeper connection to your body. This class is ideal for beginners or anyone returning to movement who wants to build confidence and body awareness in a gentle and structured way.

dance.name: Recovery Movement Flow - Foundations
dance.short_description: Safe return to movement after injury, fatigue, or long inactivity
dance.full_description: Recovery Movement Flow – Foundations is a gentle, low-impact class designed for individuals who are returning to movement after injury, illness, surgery, or an extended period of inactivity. The class focuses on rebuilding body awareness, improving mobility, and restoring confidence in movement through slow, controlled, and mindful sequences. Each session is carefully structured to support safe re-engagement with physical activity, with movements introduced gradually and adapted to individual needs. Through each curated, smooth, and authentic movement, you'll rebuild strength, flexibility, and coordination at a pace that feels right for your body. Medical clearance is required before participating in this program.
dance.medical_requirements: Medical clearance from your healthcare provider is required before participating in this program. Please bring documentation to your first class.

pole.name: Pole Fitness - Foundations
pole.short_description: Learn how to use the pole safely with grip basics and simple spins
pole.full_description: Pole Fitness – Foundations is a beginner-friendly class designed to introduce you to pole movement in a safe, structured, and supportive environment. The class focuses on building grip strength, body awareness, and basic movement patterns on the pole, giving you the confidence and technique to progress safely. Through simple, guided exercises such as basic grips, walking patterns, and low-level spins, you'll develop upper body strength, core stability, and coordination at a comfortable pace. Each session places strong emphasis on technique, posture, and control, ensuring you build a solid foundation before progressing to more complex movements. This class is ideal for complete beginners with no prior experience who want to explore pole fitness in a safe and encouraging setting.
core_focus: Upper body strength and core stability
pole.client_outcome: I understand the pole and feel safe using it
what_to_expect: Learning to walk around the pole confidently

pole.name: Pole Flow - Foundations
pole.short_description: Create smooth transitions and flowing movement around the pole
pole.client_outcome: I can move around the pole smoothly and confidently
pole.prerequisite: Pole Fitness Foundations or instructor approval
pole.full_description: Pole Flow – Foundations builds on the basics of pole movement by introducing smooth transitions, connected sequences, and a greater sense of fluidity and control on the pole. The class focuses on linking movements together in a way that feels natural and graceful, developing coordination, timing, and body awareness through guided flow-based sequences. Through each curated, smooth, and authentic movement, you'll improve your ability to transition between positions with ease and confidence. This class is ideal for those who have completed Pole Fitness – Foundations and are ready to develop their movement quality and flow.

pole.name: Pole Strength & Movement - Foundations
pole.short_description: Build conditioning, holds, and controlled movement on the pole
pole.prerequisite: Pole Fitness Foundations or instructor approval
pole.full_description: Pole Strength & Movement – Foundations introduces a strength-focused approach to pole training, combining conditioning exercises with controlled movement patterns to build upper body strength, core stability, and overall body control. The class focuses on developing the physical foundation needed to progress in pole fitness, with an emphasis on safe technique, body alignment, and progressive strength building. Through guided exercises and structured movement sequences, you'll build the strength and control needed to perform more advanced pole skills with confidence. This class is ideal for those who have completed Pole Fitness – Foundations and want to build strength and conditioning alongside their pole practice.

yoga.name: Fusion Yoga - Foundations
yoga.short_description: Modern fusion of traditional yoga with contemporary movement
yoga.full_description: Fusion Yoga – Foundations is a beginner-friendly class that blends traditional yoga with modern movement to create an accessible and engaging practice. The class focuses on improving flexibility, mobility, and body awareness through a combination of classic yoga postures and contemporary movement patterns. Each session is structured to guide you through simple, well-rounded sequences that build strength, improve posture, and develop a greater sense of ease and control in your body. Through each curated, smooth, and authentic movement, you'll develop flexibility, coordination, and a deeper connection to your body. This class is ideal for beginners or anyone looking for a fresh and accessible approach to yoga.

yoga.name: Traditional Yoga - Foundations
yoga.short_description: Classic yoga practices rooted in traditional techniques
yoga.full_description: Traditional Yoga – Foundations offers a beginner-friendly approach to building a strong and steady yoga practice through classic postures, breath control, and mindful movement. The class follows a structured and grounded format, helping you develop flexibility, strength, and balance at a comfortable pace. Each session guides you through simple, well-established sequences with a focus on alignment, posture, and controlled breathing. Movements are introduced gradually, allowing you to build confidence and stability without pressure. Through each curated, smooth, and authentic movement, you'll develop body awareness, improve mobility, and create a sense of ease and control in your practice.

yoga.name: Flow Yoga - Foundations
yoga.short_description: Contemporary approach to yoga for today's lifestyle
yoga.full_description: Flow Yoga – Foundations offers a beginner-friendly approach to yoga through fluid movement, functional strength, and simple, dynamic sequences. The class focuses on improving mobility, stability, and overall body control while keeping the practice accessible and easy to follow. Combining traditional yoga elements with modern movement patterns, each session creates an active and engaging experience built around controlled transitions, posture, and strength through movement rather than long static holds. Through each curated, smooth, and authentic movement, you'll develop body awareness, improve flexibility, and build strength in a way that feels natural and sustainable.

yoga.name: Aerial Yoga - Foundations
yoga.short_description: Experience yoga suspended in silk hammocks
yoga.full_description: Aerial Yoga – Foundations introduces you to movement using a suspended hammock in a safe and structured environment. The class focuses on improving flexibility, mobility, and strength while reducing pressure on the joints through supported movement. Through simple, guided sequences, the hammock is used to assist stretching, balance, and controlled transitions, allowing you to move with greater ease and confidence. Each session emphasises posture, alignment, and gentle strength work, making movement more accessible while still building control. This class is ideal for beginners with no prior experience who want to explore a supported approach to movement while improving flexibility, strength, and body awareness.

aerial.name: Aerial Silks - Foundations
aerial.short_description: Learn to dance and perform acrobatics on suspended fabric silks
aerial.full_description: Aerial Silks – Foundations introduces you to aerial movement using suspended fabric in a safe and structured environment. The class focuses on building strength, coordination, and body awareness while learning to move with control and confidence off the ground. Through simple, guided techniques such as basic grips, supported holds, and low-level movements, you'll develop upper body strength, core stability, and coordination at a comfortable pace. Each session places strong emphasis on technique, posture, and control, allowing you to progress safely and with confidence. This class is ideal for beginners with no prior experience who want to explore aerial movement while building strength and body control in a supportive setting.
core_focus: Upper body strength and core stability
who_its_for: Complete beginners curious about aerial arts
Adults looking for a unique fitness challenge
Those wanting to build upper body strength
People who want to overcome fear and build confidence
what_to_expect: Progressive skill building from ground work to aerial
Individual attention and spotting from instructors
Cool-down and stretching to prevent injury
A supportive community of fellow aerialists

choreography.name: Choreography Fusion - Foundations
choreography.short_description: Women's movement and confidence through choreographed dance
choreography.full_description: Choreography Fusion – Foundations is a beginner-friendly class designed to help you build confidence through simple, guided movement sequences. The focus is on learning short, easy-to-follow choreography while developing coordination, timing, and body awareness in a supportive environment. Blending elements from different movement styles, each session introduces structured combinations that are broken down step by step, making them accessible even if you have no prior experience. The emphasis is on moving with clarity and confidence, without pressure to perform or get everything perfect. Through each curated, smooth, and authentic movement, you'll become more comfortable learning and remembering movement while building confidence in how you move.

intensity_groups.balanced: Low-impact, accessible, suitable for all fitness levels
intensity_groups.moderate: Moderate intensity, some fitness base recommended
intensity_groups.active: Higher intensity, regular physical activity recommended

age_groups.note: We welcome all adults regardless of age or fitness level

yoga.name: Kids Yoga - Foundations
yoga.full_description: Kids Yoga – Foundations introduces children to movement through simple, engaging, and structured activities that support coordination, balance, and body awareness. The class uses basic yoga poses in a fun and accessible way to help children build confidence while staying active. Through easy-to-follow sequences, light stretching, and gentle movement, children improve flexibility, posture, and overall coordination. Sessions are designed to keep children engaged while encouraging healthy movement habits from an early age. This class is ideal for children who benefit from calm, structured movement and want to build confidence, focus, and body awareness in a safe and supportive environment.

yoga.name: Kids Aerial Yoga - Foundations
yoga.short_description: Playful aerial yoga in hammocks for kids
yoga.full_description: Kids Aerial Yoga - Foundations introduces children to movement using a soft, suspended hammock in a safe and supportive environment. The class focuses on building coordination, balance, and body awareness while keeping movement fun and engaging. Through simple, guided exercises, children use the hammock to explore stretching, gentle strength work, and basic movement patterns. The support of the hammock allows them to move with confidence, reducing pressure on the joints while making movement more accessible and enjoyable. This class is ideal for children who enjoy playful movement and want to build confidence, coordination, and flexibility in a safe and structured setting.

pole.name: Pole Fitness Kids - Foundations
pole.short_description: Gymnastics-style pole fitness for strength and coordination
pole.note: Strength and coordination-based movement - gymnastics style
pole.full_description: Pole Fitness Kids - Foundations help children build strength, coordination, and body awareness through safe and structured movement using the pole. The class is designed to support physical development while introducing controlled, age-appropriate movement in a positive and supportive environment. Through simple, guided exercises such as basic holds, grip work, and low-level movement patterns, children learn how to move with control and stability. Movements are introduced step by step, allowing them to build upper body strength, core stability, and coordination at a comfortable pace. This class is ideal for children who enjoy active movement and want to develop strength and confidence in a safe and structured setting.

aerial.name: Kids Aerial Silks - Foundations
aerial.short_description: Introduction to aerial arts on suspended silks
aerial.full_description: Kids Aerial Silks – Foundations introduces children to aerial movement using suspended fabric in a safe and structured environment. This class focuses on building strength, coordination, and body awareness while helping children gain confidence moving off the ground. Through simple, guided exercises such as basic grips, supported holds, and low-level movements, children learn how to move with control and stability on the silks. Movements are introduced step by step, allowing them to build strength and coordination at a comfortable pace while staying engaged and active. This class is ideal for children who enjoy movement, climbing, and exploring new physical challenges in a safe and supportive setting.

dance.name: Dance Moves (Urban Mix) - Foundations
dance.short_description: Hip hop and urban dance styles for kids
dance.full_description: Dance Moves (Urban Mix) – Foundations is a fun and beginner-friendly class that introduces children to rhythm, coordination, and basic dance movement in an engaging and structured environment. Inspired by simple urban-style movement, this class keeps kids active while helping them connect with music through easy, repeatable patterns. Through guided sequences, step patterns, and rhythm-based activities, children develop timing, coordination, and body awareness in a way that feels natural and enjoyable. Movements are kept simple and age-appropriate, allowing children to build confidence as they learn to move with control and ease. This class is ideal for kids who enjoy music, movement, and staying active while building confidence in a positive and supportive setting.

dance.name: Modern Contemporary (Rhythm & Motion) - Foundations
dance.short_description: Expressive contemporary dance focusing on rhythm and movement quality
dance.full_description: Modern Contemporary (Rhythm & Motion) – Foundations introduces children to expressive movement, coordination, and musicality in a structured and supportive environment. Blending simple contemporary elements with rhythm-based movement, this class helps children explore how their body moves naturally with music. Through easy-to-follow sequences and flowing movement patterns, children learn to move with control while developing balance, posture, and coordination. The focus is on building confidence through movement, while allowing space for natural expression. Children develop body awareness, improve coordination, and become more confident in how they move and express themselves.

dance.name: Creative Dance - Foundations
dance.short_description: Imaginative movement and dance exploration for younger children
dance.full_description: Creative Dance – Foundations is a beginner-friendly class designed to encourage children to explore movement, imagination, and self-expression in a fun and supportive environment. This class focuses on helping children feel comfortable moving in their own way while building coordination and body awareness. Each session includes simple guided activities, creative movement tasks, and easy-to-follow patterns that support rhythm, balance, and control. Children are encouraged to explore different ways of moving while staying within a structured and safe framework. This class is ideal for children who enjoy freedom in movement and want to build confidence while expressing themselves in a safe and supportive environment.

age_bands.note: We use flex bands for age-appropriate grouping

filtered_booking_urls.note: Class Manager does not support filtered URLs - all buttons link to main calendar

legal.medical_disclaimer: Medical clearance from your healthcare provider is required before participating in Recovery Movement classes. By booking this class, you confirm that you have obtained appropriate medical clearance and that your healthcare provider has approved your participation in physical movement activities.
legal.general_disclaimer: All classes at UNDRGRND Movement are conducted by qualified instructors. Participants engage in physical activities at their own risk. Please inform your instructor of any injuries, medical conditions, or physical limitations before class. We recommend consulting with your healthcare provider before beginning any new exercise program.
legal.liability_waiver: By participating in classes at UNDRGRND Movement, you acknowledge that physical activity involves inherent risks. You agree to follow all safety instructions provided by instructors and to practice within your own limits. UNDRGRND Movement, its instructors, and staff are not liable for any injuries sustained during participation in classes or use of facilities.
legal.privacy_policy_summary: UNDRGRND Movement collects personal information necessary for class bookings and communication. We comply with the Australian Privacy Principles under the Privacy Act 1988. Your information is stored securely and never shared with third parties without your consent.
legal.covid_policy: We maintain hygiene protocols in accordance with Queensland Health guidelines. Please do not attend class if you are unwell or experiencing COVID-19 symptoms.

philosophy.mission: UNDRGRND Movement stands for foundational movement for body and mind. Not competition. Not performance pressure. Personal transformation only.
unique_approach: Classes held in multiple environments: studio, park, beach, and specialized spaces
Focus on individual ability and health condition rather than age restrictions
Integration of recovery and rehabilitation principles
Collaborative programs with registered counsellors for deeper integration

instructor.name: Ollie
instructor.title: Movement Practitioner & Performance Coach
instructor.bio_short: Ollie is a certified movement practitioner specializing in foundational movement, recovery practices, and performance coaching. With qualifications in yoga instruction and trauma-informed movement, Ollie creates safe, inclusive spaces for personal transformation through dance, pole, aerial, and recovery movement.
instructor.philosophy: Movement is not tied to a room or a schedule. It's about creating space for your body to reconnect with itself – whether that's in the studio, at the beach, or in the park. Every body is welcome, every level is supported, and every journey is honored.
